IRS990.ActivityOrMissionDesc: MANIFEST MEDEX FACILITATES THE COLLECTION OF ELECTRONIC CLINICAL RECORDS FROM HEALTHCARE PROVIDERS AND CLAIMS DATA FROM HEALTH INSURERS. THE CLINICAL AND CLAIMS DATA IS AGGREGATED TO PROVIDE COMPREHENSIVE LONGITUDINAL PATIENT RECORDS THAT EMPOWER MANIFEST MEDEX PARTICIPANTS WITH POWERFUL DATA TO EFFECTIVELY MANAGE THE CONTINUUM OF CARE AND DRIVE HIGHER QUALITY CARE AT A LOWER COST.
IRS990.MissionDesc: BE THE SMART GRID FOR HEALTH INFORMATION - DELIVER DATA-DRIVEN INSIGHT TO INDIVIDUALS AND HEALTH TEAMS WHEN AND WHERE THEY NEED IT SO THEY CAN IMPROVE CARE, LOWER COSTS AND ENHANCE HEALTH.
IRS990.Desc: AGGREGATING HEALTH CARE INFORMATION FROM DISPARATE PROVIDERS AND PAYERS TO ENABLE THEM TO PROVIDE MORE TIMELY, COMPLETE AND HIGHER QUALITY PATIENT-CENTERED CARE.

SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: LOBBYING FOR A STATEWIDE HEALTHCARE DATA EXCHANGE INFRASTRUCTURE FOR KEY MEDI-CAL PROGRAM AND STATE FUNCTIONS, INCLUDING THE RESPONSE TO COVID-19, FUNDED WITH FEDERAL MEDICAID MATCH, AND WITH A STATEWIDE MANDATE FOR PARTICIPATION. THERE ARE NO ACTIVE BILLS IN THE LEGISLATURE, BUT WE HAVE MET THE GOVERNOR'S OFFICE, SENATE, AND ASSEMBLY HEALTH COMMITTEES, AND MULTIPLE STATE AGENCIES.

MANAGEMENT HAS DETERMINED THAT THE COMPANY HAS APPROPRIATE SUPPORT FOR ANY TAX POSITIONS TAKEN AFFECTING ITS ANNUAL FILING REQUIREMENTS, AND AS SUCH, DOES NOT HAVE ANY UNCERTAIN TAX POSITIONS THAT ARE MATERIAL TO THE FINANCIAL STATEMENTS. ANY FUTURE ACCRUED INTEREST AND PENALTIES RELATED TO UNRECOGNIZED TAX BENEFITS AND LIABILITIES WOULD BE RECOGNIZED IN INCOME TAX EXPENSE IF SUCH INTEREST AND PENALTIES ARE INCURRED.

RecipientTable.PurposeOfGrantTxt: CONTRIBUTION TO YES ON 35 COMMITTEE - FORMED TO QUALIFY AND SUPPORT THE PROTECT ACCESS TO HEALTHCARE ACT OF 2024 ON THE NOVEMBER 2024 STATEWIDE CA BALLOT.

SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: TRISHA GROBECK RECEIVED A SEVERANCE PAYMENT OF $62,224 DURING THE YEAR.

THE NON-FIXED PAYMENTS ARE CONTRACTUALLY DRIVEN BY THE TERMS OF EMPLOYEE EMPLOYMENT AGREEMENTS. THESE ARE AWARDED AND ARE BASED UPON ACCOMPLISHMENT OF KEY DEPARTMENTAL OBJECTIVES AND ARE NOT BASED ON REVENUE OR NET INCOME METRICS.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 11B
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: PROCESS SUMMARY 1-MANIFEST MEDEX'S AUDITORS COMPLETE AN AUDIT OF THE FINANCIAL STATEMENTS FOR THE APPLICABLE YEAR. 2-MANIFEST MEDEX'S TAX PREPARER USES INFORMATION FROM (I) THE AUDITED FINANCIAL STATEMENTS AND (II) MANIFEST MEDEX AND COMPLETES A DRAFT OF THE FORM 990. 3-INTERNAL STAFF, INCLUDING THE AVP OF FINANCE, CFO AND CEO REVIEW THE DRAFT FORM 990 AND MAKE ANY REQUIRED ADJUSTMENTS TO IT. 4-THE MANIFEST MEDEX BOARD IS PROVIDED A COPY OF THE FINAL DRAFT OF THE FORM 990 AND PROVIDED A REASONABLE PERIOD OF TIME TO REVIEW IT AND ASK ANY QUESTIONS OF MANAGEMENT BEFORE IT IS FILED WITH THE IRS.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 12C
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: EACH "INSIDER" IS RESPONSIBLE FOR KNOWING AND FOLLOWING THE POLICY INCLUDING HAVING A DUTY TO DISCOVER AND DISCLOSE A CONFLICT. ALSO, EACH INSIDER, AND OTHER PERSONS THAT MX'S BOARD MAY IDENTIFY FROM TIME TO TIME, SHALL ANNUALLY SIGN A DISCLOSURE STATEMENT IN THE FORM ATTACHED HERETO, THAT: 1. AFFIRMS THAT THE PERSON HAS RECEIVED, READ AND UNDERSTANDS THIS POLICY, AND AGREES TO COMPLY WITH THE POLICY; AND 2. DISCLOSES THE PERSON'S INTERESTS AND FAMILY RELATIONSHIPS THAT COULD GIVE RISE TO A CONFLICT.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 15
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE COMPANY'S BOARD ADOPTED AN EMPLOYEE COMPENSATION POLICY AND ESTABLISHED A COMPENSATION COMMITTEE. THIS COMMITTEE REVIEWS AND RECOMMENDS TO THE BOARD ALL COMPENSATION FOR OFFICERS AND OTHER KEY EMPLOYEES, EXCEPT FOR THE CEO WHICH THE BOARD AS A WHOLE ANALYZES AND APPROVES. THE REVIEW PROCESS INCLUDES A REVIEW OF BACKGROUND INFORMATION (E.G. EDUCATION, EXPERIENCE, ETC.) AND COMPARABILITY DATA (E.G. COMPENSATION SURVEYS). THE BOARD THEN DETERMINES WHETHER TO APPROVE THE COMPENSATION OF THE CEO AND OTHER OFFICERS AND KEY EMPLOYEES BASED ON THE INFORMATION COMPILED.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION C, LINE 19
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE GOVERNING DOCUMENTS, CONFLICT OF INTEREST POLICY, AND FINANCIAL STATEMENTS ARE ALL AVAILABLE UPON REQUEST.
